svg.title: Medical data warehouse — full project architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline: CSV source to ADLS Gen2 bronze layer, Synapse SQL analysis, PySpark cleaning notebook, silver and gold Parquet layers, Synapse SQL views, Power BI dashboard and Python Seaborn charts.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the source dataset')
sendPrompt('Explain the ADLS Gen2 bronze layer ingestion')
g.text: Bronze layer · raw-data container · CSV stored untouched

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Synapse SQL external table and view creation')
g.text: bronze_patients view · 20+ analytics queries · data quality checks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the PySpark notebook cleaning steps')
g.text: Excel fix (20-Nov→11-20) · null handling · deduplication · text standardisation
Feature engineering: Age_Group · Stay_Numeric · Stay_Category · custom UDFs
Seaborn + Matplotlib — 12 charts rendered inline in notebook

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Synapse SQL views over Parquet')
sendPrompt('Explain the Power BI dashboard built for this project')
sendPrompt('Explain the Python seaborn visualizations in the notebook')
